forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 40 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h tending southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h tending southwesterly before dawn then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h tending southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast. Possible small hail. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Areas of morning frost near the coast. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
